text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Everybody ready?!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: All right, here we go… Let's party hard at Bubblyland!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wait, why are we in swimsuits?!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Because this is a pool resort, of course♪ 
They let you enter the disco and cafes in your swimsuit here! 
Plus, you feel the vibes more!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Tickezo, are you sure you don't want to buy a swimsuit?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Yep! Our school-issue swimsuit is durable! It's perfect for 
swimming as hard as you can, so it's good enough for me!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: If you say so! Now come on! Let's enjoy ourselves to the fullest!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
(Wh-wh-what should I do? There's no way 
I can get any training done here!)

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
(In fact, I don't see a track anywhere, and all the visitors 
just look like they're here to have fun…)

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
(What did Maruzen even mean when she said 
I could get out of my slump here?)

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
You know, Spe… There's only one thing you should be 
doing here today, and it's not running.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: It's… not? Then what is it…

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Dancing?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: C'mon, Spe! Let's go up on that platform and get our groove on!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! Uh, you want to go over to that… dance stage thing? 
I don't know. I'm just, uh, I don't know what to do on one!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry! Once you start dancing, none of that'll matter! 
It'll be fun!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Besides, Maruzen said she wanted you to have fun 
and enjoy yourself to the max today, so let's gooo!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Come on, Spe! Just humor me and come dance with us♪

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?! W-Wait a second!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh! What should I do?! I don't know how 
this dance goes at all!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! This isn't a concert, so don't 
worry about choreography or anything! 
It'll be fine — just dance your heart out!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: D-Dance my heart out?! U-Umm, like this?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yep, yep! Just like that! Don't forget to cheer too! Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: W-Wooooo?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, wave that fan! One, two! One, two! 
That's the spirit! Looking good, Spe!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: O-One, two. One, two… Hehe. Just what are we doing? Ahaha!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: …Hehe, thanks, Tickezo. You two are looking fine♪

text_block_list.name: Man A
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Maruzensky's here!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oh my, my! Are you having fun, everyone?

text_block_list.name: Visitors
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Let's all lose ourselves to the magic of the disco! Woohoo!

The excitement reaches new heights as the entire venue 
goes wild to Maruzensky's call!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
(People are smiling, music's playing, and everything's 
so bright and sparkly! It feels like a dream!)

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: (What is this feeling? It's been such a long time since I've felt this way…)

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Spe! Don't forget to wave your fan!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Okay! Ehehe♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hehe♪

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Aaah! Nata de coco's the best!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Hey, have you guys gone down that waterslide yet?! 
It's so fast and super fun!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Wow, it's huge! Just listen to those screams, though. 
Is it really safe?!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Look over there! Another dance podium! It's called a water 
disco, 'cause you can dance surrounded by water fountains!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oooh! So many girls are dancing on it! It looks like lots of fun!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
This park is filled to the brim with delicious food and fun 
things to do… I never knew such a place existed.
(Ding, dong…)

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
It's happy hour at Bubbly Cafe, where you can enjoy 
our all-you-can-eat tiramisu. Come and join us!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
All-you-can-eat tiramisu?! No way! 
Oh my gosh, where's the cafe?!
